case_title: WALSH, JOAN vs. LANG, PETER DBA SAFARI WEST et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALSH, JOAN AS TO DEFENDANT LANG, PETER DBA SAFARI WEST WILDLIFE PRESERVE & TENT CAMP DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-28-2001 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-26-2001 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-10-2001
